display_text: Observer and Sentry Wards Dispenser, Cost: 50: Holds both Observer and Sentry wards in one item slot. Double-click to switch between ward types before planting. Can share individual wards with allies by holding Control. Consumable. Stats: No Cooldown, No Mana Cost.

display_text: Observer and Sentry Wards Dispenser, Cost: 50: Core vision tool for supports. Observer Wards provide map control and vision for 6 minutes. Sentry Wards provide True Sight to deward enemy vision or detect invisible heroes. Essential for controlling key objectives. Stats: Observer Cost: 75, Sentry Cost: 100, Observer Duration: 6 min, Sentry Duration: 8 min.

display_text: Observer and Sentry Wards Dispenser, Cost: 50: Purchase for efficient slot usage when you need both vision and detection. Use Sentry Wards to counter invisibility-based heroes or to deward common enemy Observer spots. Share wards with allies to free up inventory slots. Prioritize placing Observers for high-ground vision and Sentries for objective control. Stats: Observer Vision: 1600, Sentry True Sight Range: 1050, Observer Cast Range: 500, Sentry Cast Range: 500.
